hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|mjs)$' && npm run lint -- --fix "$f" 2>/dev/null || true; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|test|spec)$' && npm run test -- "$f" 2>/dev/null || true; }
